caption:
✨ The neon heat was the only thing hotter than this chrome serpent wrapping its way toward me. 👠 I’m the queen of this electric slum, but tonight the underworld is hunting me. 🌃

My synthetic skin gleamed under the mag-lights of the mega-rain, that shimmer of oil making my curves impossible to miss. The swimsuit I wore—neon pink, razor-thin, made of smart-fabric that shifted colors—felt like a dare. 

The bounty hunter dropped from the air above like a glitching drone, his heat signature burning a hole in my back. 💥 I barely twisted, the chrome snake of data-flow surging around my arm like lightning, guiding me through the shadows.

He cornered me in a rusted alleyway, the smell of ozone and rain mixing with his musk. 

"Last chance," he panted, his cybernetic arm sparking. 

I flashed him a smile that could slice diamond. "Always."

Then my suit glitched, colors swirling into a crimson pulse. A shockwave of energy rolled off me, stunning him. My cyber-augmentations flared, the smart-fabric shifting to reveal just a fraction more than decency allows, hugging every sin of my frame. He blinked, stunned, while I stepped into the neon flow. 

He was just the start. 🌌 My world’s more dangerous than he imagined, far more electric than he could predict.

#Cyberpunk #NeonNights #SummerInChrome #SassyScouts #BountyHunterLove
